content.full_text:
July 19, 1977

Mr. Gaylen Larsen  
County Clerk  
County of Fresno  
Room 300, Hall of Records  
2281 Tulare Street  
Fresno, California 93721

Dear Mr. Larsen:

Enclosed please find a copy of a letter sent to Mr. Frank Zolin interpreting Government Code §87200, et seq. [and in particular, §87205(b)] in the manner I recently discussed with you on the telephone. You may interpret the substance of that letter to constitute written advice to you issued pursuant to Government Code §83114(b) in any and all similar circumstances arising within your jurisdiction.

Thank you for bringing this matter to our attention. I trust this resolves your problem. If I can be of further assistance in this or any matter, please feel free to call on me at 916/322-6444.

Sincerely,

[handwritten signature]
Kenneth W. Goshorn  
Research Specialist III  
Conflicts of Interest Division

KWG:glb  
enclosure
